_comment: Reference shape for the JSON-LD object that publisher.py builds and embeds in MDX frontmatter as `jsonLd`. This file is documentation, not a runtime template — the actual object is built in Python so we can keep it programmatically validatable. If you're customizing what goes into JSON-LD, edit publisher.build_jsonld() and update this file in lockstep so it stays an honest reference.
headline: <HEADLINE — same as MDX title, ≤60 chars>

author.name: <COMPANY NAME>
author.url: <COMPANY URL — derived from cta_url's origin if no explicit url is set>

logo.url: <COMPANY LOGO URL — only emitted if company.logo_path is set>
